name: Causes
postCreateCommand: bazel version && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && (jj git init --colocate 2>/dev/null || true) && jj config set --user ui.default-command log && jj config set --user user.name "$(git config --global user.name)" && jj config set --user user.email "$(git config --global user.email)"
